senses.def_en: to set going by taking the first step; begin
senses.example: The small sparkle often initiates a large flame.

senses.def_en: to introduce to a new field, skill, activity etc.
senses.example: I shall initiate you into our business methods.
senses.example_zh: 我将把我们的营业方法介绍给你。

senses.example: The club will initiate a new group of members on Tuesday.
senses.example_zh: 该俱乐部将于星期二接纳一批新成员。

senses.example: These secrets are known only to a small group of initiates.
senses.example_zh: 只有小部分新加入的成员知道这些内幕。

senses.example: You don't necessarily have to go.
Study is necessarily difficult, but it pays off.
senses.example_zh: 学习的过程必然是苦的，但果实却是甜的。

senses.def_en: sth. that you must have or do
senses.example: Food and water are the necessities of life. // He seemed to feel the necessity of some slight explanation.
senses.example_zh: 食品和水是生活的必需品。 // 他似乎感到有必要略做解释。

entries.mnemonic: pro(forward)+test(考试)→提前考试，会遭到学生“反对”

senses.example: The region is open to tourists over environmentalists' protest.
senses.example_zh: 尽管环保主义者反对，这一地区仍向旅游者开放。

senses.def_en: to express a strong objection to sth.
senses.example: There was a large crowd in the square, protesting (against) the war.
senses.example_zh: 广场上聚集了一大群反对这场战争的人。

entries.mnemonic: contra(相反)+dict(说话)→说相反的话→反驳

senses.def_en: to disagree with sth., esp. by saying that the opposite is true
senses.example: It's difficult to contradict someone politely.
senses.example_zh: 彬彬有礼地驳斥别人是难以做到的。

senses.def_en: to be contrary to; be inconsistent with
senses.example: The two statements contradict each other.

derivatives: contradiction n. 矛盾；否认 // contradictory a. 对立的；爱反驳别人的 // self-contradictory a. 自相矛盾的

senses.def_en: to improve by alteration, correction of error, etc.
senses.example: plans to reform the tax system

senses.def_en: to persuade sb. to give up harmful or immoral practices
senses.example: try to reform wrong-doers 设法使做坏事的人改过自新 // You have had every chance to reform.
senses.example_zh: 你是一直有改过自新的机会的。

senses.example: Tax reforms did not benefit the middle class.
senses.example_zh: 税制改革对中产阶级没有好处。

senses.example: The family rejoiced in the drunkard's reform.
senses.example_zh: 一家人对那个酒鬼的改过自新深感高兴。

senses.example: I asked the girl behind the counter if they had any postcards.
senses.example_zh: 我问柜台后的女营业员是否有明信片卖。

senses.example: The bank teller used a mechanical counter to count the pennies.
senses.example_zh: 银行出纳员用机械计数器点硬币。

senses.def_en: to say sth. in order to try to prove that what sb. said was not true or as a reply to sth.
senses.example: I countered her arguments by pointing out the advantages of my plan.
senses.example_zh: 我指出自己所做计划的优点以反驳她的论点。

extras.content: of necessity 无法避免地，必定 The summary of his findings is, of necessity, very brief. 他研究成果的总结必定很简短。
